HEAVY-DUTY SPECIALISTS

Industrial Scaffolding

Complex engineering, high-load capacities, and rigorous safety protocols for industrial infrastructure across the South East.

Engineered for Extreme Environments

SWP Scaffolding provides specialized access solutions for industrial settings including factories, processing plants, and civil engineering sites. Our designs prioritize structural integrity and operational safety in high-risk environments.

Safety Standards:

  • • NASC Member Standard Compliance
  • • Advanced Rescue Plans in place
  • • Weekly Site Safety Audits
  • • Method Statements & Risk Assessments (RAMS)

Industrial Capabilities

Infrastructure

Scaffolding for bridges, tunnels, and railway access projects.

Plant Maintenance

Internal and external access for scheduled machinery maintenance and shutdowns.

Suspended Scaffolds

Specialist cantilevered and drop scaffolds for areas where ground access is limited.

Need an Industrial Solution?

Contact our technical design team to discuss your project's specific load requirements and safety constraints.
